nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.grounding_span: Its USUSALLY much faster than me writing it

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I trust Claude to complete them somewhat unsupervised

nodes.label: AI capability for complex tasks

nodes.grounding_span: it was the number of steps it could do at a time

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I will be very disappointed the day AI can take away my creative direction

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as full-task delegator for large projects
nodes.grounding_span: the fastest way is to build the general structure myself, then have an agentic model update and fill in bits

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: much faster than me writing it

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I love the creative and directive phase of any project

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: i just watched it for like 15 minutes while working on something else

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: AI has frustrated me a million times. and its all just due to misunderstanding implied context or instructions

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for delegating implementation while retaining direction
nodes.grounding_span: I love the creative and directive phase of any project

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I always carefully audit any code I get the script to write

nodes.label: Experience-based sense-checking before delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I wrote detailed readme files specifically for Claude on how to use all these resources together

nodes.label: Iterative quality control using AI self-audit and cross-model verification
nodes.grounding_span: I am moving towards having AI do some of its own auditing
